AuthorDetails.Name: Gibe Digital Ltd
AuthorDetails.Description: Based in Bristol, we are a full service digital agency with a strong focus on technical development.

Description: Auto-save your work as you go, just like Gmail. Never lose your edits again.

Screenshots.Caption: A demo of the Drafts package in action. The content editor is making changes to a page, and the draft is auto-saved. The user then navigates away from the page and returns to find their draft still available.
Content editor showing a draft has been auto-saved and the Drafts menu item in the sidebar below the Recycle Bin.
List of drafts displayed in a table. Empty drafts button shown above the table.
Modal showing a difference between the current content and a draft. The user can choose to load the draft or discard it.

Title: Drafts
